_note: Synthetic vectors: nke-watteco Skydome ships no TTN upstream examples, so payloads were hand-built to the Watteco ZCL standard-report wire format and expected.data was produced via the ORACLE method (decoded with reference/upstream-codec.js, then normalized to vocabulary keys). Angle = cluster 0x000C attr 0x0055 IEEE754 float32 big-endian (degrees); battery = cluster 0x0050 attr 0x0006 power descriptor (mV/1000 V). All on fPort 125.

uplink.description: standard analog-input report, negative angle -12.25 deg (float32 0xC1440000)
power-descriptor report, disposable battery 3.688 V (bit2 flag, 0x0E68 mV)
lorawan-configuration report, message type confirmed (cluster 0x8004 attr 0)
Huffman batch frame (byte0 bit0 clear) is not decoded

errors: Huffman batch frames are not supported
